/bin/zsh -lc "python - <<'PY'
import json
from urllib import request

BASE = 'http://localhost:8565/api/v1/sessions'

def post(url, payload):
    data = json.dumps(payload).encode('utf-8')
    req = request.Request(url, data=data, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'})
    with request.urlopen(req) as response:
        return json.loads(response.read().decode('utf-8'))

session = post(BASE, {'working_title': 'QA Character Refinement'})
session_id = session['id']
post(f'{BASE}/{session_id}/selections/genre', {'genre_slug': 'quest-fantasy', 'origin': 'workspace'})
post(f'{BASE}/{session_id}/selections/tone', {'tone_profile_slug': 'hushed-wonder', 'origin': 'workspace'})
post(
    f'{BASE}/{session_id}/brief',
    {
        'story_idea': 'A child and an otter guardian follow floating lanterns across a harbor before bed.',
        'origin': 'workspace'
    }
)
pitches = post(f'{BASE}/{session_id}/pitches/generate', {'candidate_count': 3, 'origin': 'workspace'})
pitch_id = pitches['snapshot']['pitch_batches'][0]['pitches'][0]['id']
post(f'{BASE}/{session_id}/selections/pitch', {'pitch_id': pitch_id, 'origin': 'workspace'})
characters = post(f'{BASE}/{session_id}/characters/generate', {'candidate_count': 3, 'origin': 'workspace'})
character = characters['snapshot']['character_sheet_batches'][0]['character_sheets'][0]
refined = post(
    f'{BASE}/{session_id}/characters/refine',
    {
        'character_sheet_id': character['id'],
        'revision_number': character['revision_number'],
        'title': character['title'],
        'instructions': 'Soften the protagonist voice and keep the same comfort ritual.',
        'focus_character_names': [character['protagonist_name']],
        'change_summary': 'Keep the same harbor arc but make the dialogue gentler.',
        'change_impact': 'minor',
        'origin': 'workspace'
    }
)
print(json.dumps({
    'session_id': session_id,
    'selected_character_title': refined['snapshot']['selected_character_sheet']['title'],
    'selected_character_change_impact': refined['snapshot']['selected_character_sheet']['change_impact']
}, indent=2))
PY"
